title: Viral Genome Release and Native Viral Particle Conversion Measured Through Temperature Ramping in Real Time PCR Machine
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7nil7","text":"This protocol was developed to use common wet lab device (Real Time PCR machine) to detect viral genome release and native viral particle conversion. We used temperature ramping for inducing genome uncoating and fluorescent probes for RNA/DNA and/or proteins, to detect genome and/or capsid changes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"97i17","text":"Prepare a master mix (3.5X) with virus and probes in thermo stable buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"679bd","text":"Final volume 70 µL","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"14go0","text":"Add replicates to 96-well PCR plate (Replicates 3 X 20 µL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"47oph","text":"Seal the plate","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"97goa","text":"Place the plate in Real Time PCR Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"692sf","text":"Open the software and run a melting curve assay.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"97oh5","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"etsjn","text":"All the material must be decontaminated before trashing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
